displayTitle: Follow the Last Metal to Freeze

beats.narration: A weld is built layer by layer. A casting is one violent event: every flaw decided in minutes, inside a closed mold.

payload.title: CASTING FLAWS
payload.sub: Read the process to read the film.

beats.narration: Metal shrinks three times: as cooling liquid, as liquid turns solid, and as cooling solid. The freeze is the killer.
The riser feeds that freeze. Cut a T junction off from liquid feed and the missing volume becomes a void: shrinkage at the thermal center.

payload.heading: Shrink hunts thermal centers
payload.note: L · T · V · X JUNCTIONS FREEZE LAST

beats.narration: Gas rises toward the cope. Hot tears rip at section changes. Cold shuts seam far from the gate. Planar ones hide from a broadside beam.

chips.s: Streams met too cold to fuse

beats.narration: So before you hang film, replay the pour. Follow the last metal to freeze. That's where shrink lives. Aim your shots there.

payload.sub: Shrink lives where the casting froze last.
